# emma_volume (Data Source)

This data source retrieves information about an existing storage volume in the Emma platform.

Use this data source to query volume details by ID, including size, type, status, and attachment information.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Query an existing volume by ID
data "emma_volume" "existing" {
  id = "12345"
}

# Use the volume data in other resources
output "volume_size" {
  value = data.emma_volume.existing.volume_gb
}

output "volume_status" {
  value = data.emma_volume.existing.status
}

# Reference volume attributes
output "volume_location" {
  value = data.emma_volume.existing.location.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) ID of the volume

### Read-Only

- `attached_to_id` (Number) ID of the compute instance the volume is attached to
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp
- `data_center` (Attributes) Data center details (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--data_center))
- `data_center_id` (String) Data center ID where the volume is located
- `is_system` (Boolean) Indicates whether the volume contains the operating system
- `location` (Attributes) Geographic location information (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--location))
- `name` (String) Name of the volume
- `project_id` (Number) Project ID owning the volume
- `provider` (Attributes) Cloud provider information (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--provider))
- `status` (String) Current status of the volume
- `volume_gb` (Number) Volume size in gigabytes
- `volume_type` (String) Volume type (e.g., ssd, hdd)

<a id="nestedatt--data_center"></a>
### Nested Schema for `data_center`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Data center ID
- `name` (String) Data center name


<a id="nestedatt--location"></a>
### Nested Schema for `location`

Read-Only:

- `continent` (String) Continent
- `id` (Number) Location ID
- `name` (String) Location name
- `region` (String) Region


<a id="nestedatt--provider"></a>
### Nested Schema for `provider`

Read-Only:

- `id` (Number) Provider ID
- `name` (String) Provider name
